text:
Once upon a time there were two men from different cities. One of them had a new sports car, the other dreamed about a city vacation. One sunny day, they decided to meet at a bustling flower market. They each bought a vaseful of exotic flowers.

They stood there for a while talking about everything under the ground that lives outside our world… tiny beetles, cricket chorus singing nightly. They talked a lot about their spouses.

After the sun set they went hiking towards a nearby lake fed by the little brook below the market.

The first man had a beautiful Japanese cherry blossom garden that was visited by all sorts of birds and deer.

The second man's house was quiet as he admired the night songbirds nesting in the branches.

After staking out for a while enjoying their blossoms and song birds' serenades, they wandered into a quiet part of the lake to watch some of the nightingbirds.

That's all there is to say.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
